category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts MIDI audio files to CSV; official Fourmilab page describes converting MIDI files to and from CSV while preserving MIDI information.
display_name_sources: Official Fourmilab page title and heading use MIDICSV; source_facts.name is midicsv.
docs_sources: Official Fourmilab page includes download information, manual pages for midicsv and csvmidi, and MIDI CSV format documentation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Fourmilab page provides a source tarball but no official source-control repository URL was found, so repo remains null.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists midicsv and csvmidi; official Fourmilab documentation describes translating standard MIDI files to CSV and back.
